title: Anthropic Just Replaced Claude Code With New Claude Tag
summary: Anthropic released Claude Tag, a team version of Claude Code integrated into Slack for workplace collaboration. It enables AI-driven task management within company tools and public channels, replacing the earlier Claude Slack chatbot for enterprise workflows.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Tag, a team version of Claude Code built into Slack for workplace collaboration. It matters because the tool moves Claude from a standalone chatbot toward an integrated agent that operates inside company tools and public channels. Key takeaways: Claude Tag handles AI-driven task management within enterprise workflows, and it replaces the earlier Claude Slack chatbot for those collaborative use cases.
